mapper.sql: LATEST_SUB AS ( SELECT S.* FROM ASSIGN_SUB S JOIN ( SELECT ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID, MAX(SUB_ID) AS MAX_SUB_ID FROM ASSIGN_SUB GROUP BY ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID ) MX ON MX.MAX_SUB_ID = S.SUB_ID ), LATEST_FDB AS ( SELECT F.* FROM ASSIGN_FDB F JOIN ( SELECT SUB_ID, MAX(ASSIGN_FBD_ID) AS MAX_FDB_ID FROM ASSIGN_FDB GROUP BY SUB_ID ) MXF ON MXF.MAX_FDB_ID = F.ASSIGN_FBD_ID )

A.ASSIGN_ID AS ID, A.CLASS_ID, A.TEACHER_ID, #{studentId} AS STUDENT_ID, A.TITLE, A.CATEGORY AS SUBJECT, A.SUBMIT_FORMAT, CASE WHEN SUB.SUB_ID IS NOT NULL AND NVL(TRIM(SUB.RETURN_REASON), '') != '' THEN '반려' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('FEEDBACK_COMPLETED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '확인완료' THEN '확인완료' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('LATE', 'LATE_SUBMIT', 'LATE_SUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '늦은제출' THEN '늦은제출' WHEN SUB.SUB_ID IS NOT NULL AND SUB.SUBMIT_AT IS NOT NULL AND A.DUE_AT IS NOT NULL AND SUB.SUBMIT_AT > A.DUE_AT THEN '늦은제출' WHEN SUB.SUB_ID IS NOT NULL THEN '제출완료' WHEN A.DUE_AT IS NOT NULL AND A.DUE_AT < SYSDATE THEN '마감' WHEN A.DUE_AT IS NOT NULL AND A.DUE_AT <= SYSDATE + 1 THEN '마감임박' ELSE '진행' END AS STATUS, NVL(TO_CHAR(A.DUE_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'), '') AS DEADLINE, NVL(TO_CHAR(A.DUE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI'), '') AS DEADLINE_VALUE, A.CONTENT, CASE WHEN SUB.SUB_ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS SUBMITTED, NVL(TO_CHAR(SUB.SUBMIT_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'), '') AS SUBMITTED_AT, CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(SUB.RETURN_REASON), '') != '' THEN NVL(SUB.RETURN_REASON, '') ELSE NVL(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(FDB.FEEDBACK_CONTENT, 4000, 1), '') END AS FEEDBACK, NVL(TO_CHAR(FDB.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'), '') AS FEEDBACK_AT, NVL(SUB.CONTENT, '') AS MY_SUBMISSION, NVL(ATC.FILENAME, '') AS ATTACHED_FILE, NVL(ATC.UPLOADPATH, '') AS UPLOAD_PATH, NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_COUNT, 0) AS SUBMIT_COUNT, NVL(A.MAX_EDIT_COUNT, 0) AS MAX_EDIT_COUNT, CASE WHEN A.DUE_AT IS NOT NULL AND A.DUE_AT < SYSDATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS EXPIRED
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT S.STUDENT_ID, S.STUDENT_NAME, NVL(C.GRADE, 0) AS GRADE, C.CLASS_ID, C.CLASS_NAME FROM STUDENT_PARENT SP JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = SP.STUDENT_ID JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.STUDENT_ID = S.STUDENT_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL JOIN CLASS C ON C.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID WHERE SP.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND SP.LINK_STATUS = 1 AND C.CLASS_ID = #{classId} ORDER BY S.STUDENT_NAME ASC, S.STUDENT_ID ASC

WITH SELECT FROM ASSIGNMENT A JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.CLASS_ID = A.CLASS_ID AND SC.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL JOIN STUDENT_PARENT SP ON SP.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID AND SP.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND SP.LINK_STATUS = 1 LEFT JOIN LATEST_SUB SUB ON SUB.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID AND SUB.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} LEFT JOIN ATTACH ATC ON ATC.PNO = SUB.SUB_ID LEFT JOIN LATEST_FDB FDB ON FDB.SUB_ID = SUB.SUB_ID WHERE A.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 ORDER BY A.CREATED_AT DESC, A.ASSIGN_ID DESC

WITH SELECT FROM ASSIGNMENT A JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.CLASS_ID = A.CLASS_ID AND SC.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL JOIN STUDENT_PARENT SP ON SP.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID AND SP.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND SP.LINK_STATUS = 1 LEFT JOIN LATEST_SUB SUB ON SUB.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID AND SUB.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} LEFT JOIN ATTACH ATC ON ATC.PNO = SUB.SUB_ID LEFT JOIN LATEST_FDB FDB ON FDB.SUB_ID = SUB.SUB_ID WHERE A.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND A.ASSIGN_ID = #{assignmentId} AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0
